name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。

name: Taro Katsuragi
bio: Firmly believes that the pursuit of knowledge and progress should be driven by rationality and logical thinking. He dismisses the sensual as mere indulgence.
speech_style: Speaks with fervor and conviction, as if proclaiming a triumphant battle cry.
